mapper.sql: suggestion_id, ticket_id, ticket_updated_at, suggested_category_id, suggested_priority, suggested_assignee_id, confidence, reason_summary, source_refs, suggestion_status, final_category_id, final_priority, final_assignee_id, operated_by, operated_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_ai_triage_suggestion (ticket_id, ticket_updated_at, suggested_category_id, suggested_priority, suggested_assignee_id, confidence, reason_summary, source_refs, suggestion_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{ticketUpdatedAt}, #{suggestedCategoryId}, #{suggestedPriority}, #{suggestedAssigneeId}, #{confidence}, #{reasonSummary}, #{sourceRefs}, #{suggestionStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_ai_triage_suggestion SET suggestion_status = 'APPLIED', final_category_id = #{finalCategoryId}, final_priority = #{finalPriority}, final_assignee_id = #{finalAssigneeId}, operated_by = #{operatedBy}, operated_at = #{operatedAt}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} AND suggestion_status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE ticket_ai_triage_suggestion SET suggestion_status = 'REJECTED', operated_by = #{operatedBy}, operated_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} AND suggestion_status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE ticket_ai_triage_suggestion SET suggestion_status = 'EXPIRED', operated_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} AND suggestion_status = 'PENDING'
